title: pfaffia aurata
intro: Pfaffia aurata, also known as Suma, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Brazil and Argentina. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Pfaffia aurata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and supporting adrenal function. Pfaffia aurata can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for maintaining overall well-being.
